question: Given calls for a no-fly zone over Ukraine by foreign policy elites and news outlets on day 12 of the invasion, what would be expected to happen if NATO enforced such a zone?
answer: Enforcing a no-fly zone would mean NATO directly participating in the conflict, escalating the war to involve the U.S. and most of Europe.

video: News headlines from Fox News and Politico indicate calls for a no-fly zone over Ukraine on day 12 of the invasion, with mentions of Russian oil boycotts and limited no-fly zones gaining support among foreign policy elites.
text: Enforcing a no-fly zone would mean NATO directly participating in the conflict, escalating the war to involve the US and most of Europe.
